name: Rajas and Mushrooms (Rajas Con Champi=f1ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms thoroughly. Slice them and fry in a pan over low heat for about 10 minutes to draw out their juice. Add salt.
2. Chop the onions finely. Mince the garlic cloves and chop the epazote.
3. Hollow out the chilies and slice into strips (forming rajas).
4. Drain the mushrooms, then fry them with the onion, garlic, epazote, and chili in a little oil. Serve alongside warm tortillas.
